title: Senior Staff Site Reliability Engineer (COR) - Prague, Czechia
score_reasoning: Your seniority and project ownership experience align well with a Senior Staff SRE level, and the COR team's Kubernetes platform work directly addresses your infrastructure interests. However, you lack Kubernetes orchestration experience—a primary requirement for this role—which significantly limits your day-to-day capability despite your strong Docker and AWS foundation. More critically, the role is anchored to Prague with monthly team meetups and local encouragement, placing it outside your preferred remote-first setup and Berlin-based location. While remote-within-Czech-Republic is mentioned, this creates a >2h timezone boundary and implicit geographic anchor that conflicts with your strong preference for Berlin hybrid or fully remote work. The infrastructure focus is a meaningful pivot from your core backend distributed-systems trajectory, which would slow your senior backend specialization goals.

red_flags: Kubernetes is primary requirement; you have no production K8s experience (Docker only)
Located in Prague with geographic anchor (monthly in-office, local encouragement); you are Berlin-based and prefer remote
Role is infrastructure/SRE pivot, not core backend/distributed-systems track you are targeting
Monthly team meetups imply some in-person expectation despite 'remote friendly' label
>2h timezone offset from Berlin to Prague affects async collaboration

description:
About Outreach

Outreach, founded in 2014, is the only complete agentic AI platform for revenue teams. Outreach infuses agentic AI, conversation intelligence, and assistive AI to power hundreds of use cases across revenue motions. From new logo prospecting to expansions, deal acceleration, driving retention, and forecasting, Outreach AI automates workflows and frees sellers to focus on more strategic conversations and actions. Revenue leaders benefit from connected account visibility, performance insights, and higher forecasting accuracy across every GTM team. World leading enterprise organizations use Outreach to power their revenue teams, including Databricks, SAP, Siemens, and Verizon to name a few. 

About the Team

Compute, Observability and Reliability (COR) is focused on providing reliable, scalable and cost-efficient infrastructure platform services that enable Outreach engineering teams to deploy and operate enterprise grade cloud services. We are one of the squads in the Foundations organization, which is a collection of squads dedicated to engineering enablement: infrastructure, services, storage, tooling, documentation, processes, and more. COR works closely with many other squads across the company for everything from optimizing our infrastructure costs & engineering efficiency to providing systems to scale our application platform to multiple geographies. 
 
The Role 

A Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) in the COR team is responsible for creating and maintaining our Kubernetes platform as well as cloud configuration and most of Outreach’s infrastructure. Every SRE in our team is expected to be empathetic to our customers (other engineers) and focused on overall performance and reliability of systems we own.

A Senior Staff SRE, specifically, is expected to be fully self-reliant and able to independently drive medium sized technical projects. 
 
Location 

While our main office is in Prague, this position is remote friendly (within the Czech Republic).
To support in-person team chemistry, we organize team meetups every month at the main office. If you are local to Prague, we also encourage you to come into the office more regularly to build relationships with the other teams using the COR platform.
